summary: When set to true, the cppr of a timing path crossing a latch (or latches) is calculated using the common pin of its origin flop and the capture device at the end of the path. Otherwise the usual segment-based cppr calculation is performed. This cppr setting is considered only when the latch thru analysis mode is enabled.
